Factsheet

Developer:
Dofu Games
Based in Zurich, Switzerland

Description

Dig Dan Dig! is an incremental mining game about reaching peak efficiency. Harvest ores for a sentient AI in exchange for powerful biological upgrades. Dig deep and discover the true cost of your Personal Improvement Plan.

download all images & videos as .zip

About Dofu Games

Boilerplate
Dofu is a staple food and comes in many forms.
